title: Buttery Gooey Croatian Milk Pudding
description: A traditional Croatian dessert made with sweetened condensed milk, butter, and eggs, resulting in a creamy and gooey pudding. This kid-friendly treat is perfect for a sweet indulgence.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together the sweetened condensed milk, butter, and vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs until lightly beaten.
Gradually add the flour to the eggs, whisking until smooth.
Temper the egg mixture by slowly pouring the warm milk mixture into the eggs, whisking constantly.
Pour the mixture into 6 (1/2 cup) ramekins or small baking dishes.
Place the ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove from the water bath and let cool to room temperature.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, top with whipped heavy cream if desired.
